name: Spicey Popcorn Munch
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 teaspoons Salt free herb & spice blend
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first two ingredients in a bowl.
2. Drizzle with vegetable oil.
3. Add the remaining ingredients and sprinkle over the popcorn mixture.
4. Toss well to combine everything evenly.
5. Spread the mixture in a single layer on a cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes, stirring once during cooking.
7. Turn off the oven and let it cool inside while still warm.
8. Store the cooled mixture in an air-tight container.
9. Makes 8 cups.
